headline: Hedge funds raise oil short bets to five-month high
summary: Investing.com -- Hedge funds increased their bearish positions on crude oil last week, with short positions in West Texas Intermediate reaching their highest point in nearly five months as market participants anticipated higher global oil supplies from easing U.S.-Iran tensions.
